query:
CREATE TABLE `knowledgeBase` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`ownerId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Other',
	`fileKey` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`fileUrl` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`fileName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`fileSize` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `knowledgeBase_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2hQLtGFTQQF4sFv.root --database gixQA33Udhd38D2dSPdEnX --execute CREATE TABLE `knowledgeBase` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`ownerId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Other',
	`fileKey` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`fileUrl` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`fileName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`fileSize` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `knowledgeBase_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
